# Jp Valery

> Personal website of Jp Valery — jpvalery.me

## Who is Jp Valery?

Jp Valery is a Customer Success Engineer at Resend, based in Montréal, Canada. Originally from Southern France, he immigrated to Canada at 22. He holds an MSc in Management (Marketing major, Design minor) from a French Grande École. He also runs Raccoon Ventures, a side company for projects and consulting.

## Professional

- Current role: Customer Success Engineer at Resend (email infrastructure)
- Previous: 4 years at Customer.io
- Side company: Raccoon Ventures (raccoonv.com) — consulting, advisorship, side projects
- Specialties: Customer success, email infrastructure, developer tools, SaaS

## Active Projects

- TrimCarbon (trimcarbon.com) — Fund verified climate projects removing CO₂
- FLAPS (github.com/jpvalery/flaps) — Open-source platform for managing/booking seats on private aircraft flights
- MSFS Flightlog (flightlog.jpvalery.me) — Screenshots and stats from Microsoft Flight Simulator
- Cuisinomicon (cuisinomicon.com) — Online cookbook (work in progress)

## Interests

- Aviation: Private Pilot License (PPL), Night Rating, aerobatics training, pursuing Multi-Engine and Floats ratings
- Photography: 294M+ views on Unsplash, founded Montréal Photo Club (2019), shoots DSLR, medium format film, large format, infrared
- Cooking & baking, gardening, 3D printing, cycling, guitar & bass, gaming

## Contact

- Email: contact@jpvalery.me
- Twitter: @jpvalery
- GitHub: github.com/jpvalery
- Unsplash: unsplash.com/@jpvalery
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/jpvalery

## Site Sections

- / — Home and bio
- /about — About hub
- /now — What Jp is currently up to (regularly updated)
- /stack — Gear and software
- /dashboard — Live personal metrics (aviation, Unsplash, shows/movies)
- /work — Professional background
- /work/recommendations — Colleague testimonials
- /work/how-to-work-with-me — Personal/professional README
- /projects — Active projects
- /projects/cemetery — Retired projects
- /photography — Photography links and portfolio
- /contact — Contact forms

## Site Details

- URL: https://jpvalery.me
- RSS: https://jpvalery.me/feed.xml
- Built with: Next.js 15 (App Router), Tailwind CSS v4, MDX, Headless UI
- Fonts: JetBrains Mono, Departure Mono, Cartridge
- Analytics: Self-hosted Umami
